title: Morgan Houppin
text: Home * People * Morgan Houppin Morgan Houppin [1] Morgan Houppin , a French software developer and student at 42 Computer Training School in Lyon [2] . As computer chess programmer, Morgan Houppin is author of the UCI compliant open source chess engine Stash [3] . Forum Posts [ edit ] New engine: Stash by Morgan Houppin , CCC , February 14, 2020 Re: sort every moves or pickNext by Morgan Houppin , CCC , May 14, 2020 » Move Ordering Re: __builtin_popcountll doesn't bring any gain by Morgan Houppin , CCC , August 28, 2020 » Population Count Re: Linux friendly engines at all levels by Morgan Houppin , CCC , October 11, 2020 » Linux External Links [ edit ] Morgan Houppin | LinkedIn Morgan Houppin · GitLab mhouppin · GitHub References [ edit ] ↑ Morgan Houppin | LinkedIn ↑ 42 Lyon | École et formation d'informatique gratuite ↑ New engine: Stash by Morgan Houppin , CCC , February 14, 2020 Up one Level
